hooks.command: [ "$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"block": true, "message": "Cannot edit on main. Create a feature branch: git checkout -b feat/p{n}-{ticket}-{slug}"}' >&2; exit 2; }

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(go)$ ]]; then
  gofmt -w "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1
  echo '{"feedback": "gofmt applied.", "suppressOutput": true}'
fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then
  npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null
  echo '{"feedback": "Prettier applied.", "suppressOutput": true}'
fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ _test\.go$ ]]; then
  dir=$(dirname "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH")
  echo '{"feedback": "Running Go tests..."}' >&2
  go test "$dir" 2>&1 | tail -20
fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.test\.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Running Vitest..."}' >&2
  npx vitest run "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -20
fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then
  output=$(cd "$(dirname "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH")" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1)
  [ $? -eq 0 ] && echo '{"feedback": "TypeScript OK.", "suppressOutput": true}' || echo "{\"feedback\": \"TypeScript errors: $output\"}" >&2
  exit 0
fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ package\.json$ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Installing deps..."}' >&2
  pnpm install 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo '{"feedback": "Deps installed.", "suppressOutput": true}'
fi
